contentBlocks.original:
नमः सवित्रे जगदेकचक्षुषे
जगत् प्रसूतिः स्थिति नाश हेतवे ।
त्रयीमयाय त्रिगुणात्मधारिणे
विरिचिनारायण शंकारात्मने ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
namaḥ savitre jagadekacakṣuṣe
jagat prasūtiḥ sthiti nāśa hetave .
trayīmayāya triguṇātmadhāriṇe
viricinārāyaṇa śaṃkārātmane ..
contentBlocks.translation: Salutation Surya, the only eye of the world, the cause of the birth, sustenance and destruction of the world; The repository of the three forms, the protector of the three gunas in the self, O Brahma, Vishnu and Sankara.
contentBlocks.meanings: नमः (namaḥ) – salutation; सवित्रे (savitre) – to Savitṛ (Sun); जगदेकचक्षुषे (jagadekacakṣuṣe) – to the only eye of the world (jagat:world | eka:one/only | cakṣuṣe:to the eye); जगत् (jagat) – world; प्रसूतिः (prasūtiḥ) – birth; स्थिति (sthiti) – sustenance; नाश (nāśa) – destruction; हेतवे (hetave) – cause; त्रयीमयाय (trayīmayāya) – repository of the three forms (trayī:three | mayāya:consisting of); त्रिगुणात्मधारिणे (triguṇātmadhāriṇe) – protector of the three gunas (tri:three | guṇa:qualities/gunas | ātma:self | dhāriṇe:protector); विरिचिनारायण (viricinārāyaṇa) – Brahma, Vishnu (virici:Brahma | nārāyaṇa:Vishnu); शंकारात्मने (śaṃkārātmane) – and Sankara (śaṃkara:Sankara | ātmane:to the self);
